training_status: consistent gym routine, working out regularly

benefits.description: Lost from 200 lbs to 178 lbs over 3 years; 196 to 178 lbs in the final 3 months with GLP-1
GLP-1 used to 'turn off all the noise from food', enabling calorie deficit adherence
Body recomposition noted over year 2 with consistent gym routine

protocol_notes: OP is 40M, 5'7". Started at ~200 lbs, now 178 lbs over 3 years. Year 1: TRT only with some fat loss. Year 2: added consistent gym routine, slow body recomposition. Year 3: added GLP-1, went from 196 to 178 lbs in ~3 months. TRT is physician-prescribed and monitored with 2 blood tests per year. Combined approach of calorie counting, macro tracking, protein targets, caloric deficit, consistent sleep, and training.
